title: lastrea floridana
intro: Lastrea floridana, also known as the Florida fern or floridian fern, is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Lastrea floridana include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams for use in traditional medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
